LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUN-30-2020 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY JEAN TALLEYRAND, M.D. HAS NOT PRODUCED THE DOCUMENTS AS REQUIRED BY THE INVESTIGATIONAL SUBPOENAS ISSUED BY THE MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR# 6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM (302/EPS)

MINI MINUTES:

Order To Show Cause Why Jean Talleyrand, M.D. Has Not Produced The Documents As Required By The Investigational Subpoenas Issued By The Medical Board Of California.

No appearances made by the parties. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Order signed.
